summary: Successfully ported shift-closure pattern from Boneyard to active CanonicalConstruction.lean. Added ShiftClosedCanonicalOmega, box_persistent, and shifted_truth_lemma. All theorems are sorry-free. Also fixed canonical_truth_lemma to handle reflexive temporal semantics from Task 967.
